footer_brand_blurb: SMART LOGISTICS & SERVICES LTD delivers compliant, reliable logistics solutions with enterprise visibility across the CEMAC region.
footer_rights_suffix: SMART LOGISTICS & SERVICES LTD. All Rights Reserved.
legal_privacy_body_html:
Smart Logistics & Services Ltd is committed to protecting personal and business information entrusted to us.

Personal data is collected and processed lawfully, fairly, and transparently for legitimate business purposes, including service delivery, regulatory compliance, and operational communication.

  • Data is collected only where necessary and used for defined purposes.
  • Appropriate technical and organizational safeguards are in place.
  • Access to data is restricted to authorized personnel.
  • Data is retained only as long as required by business or legal obligations.
  • Data subjects may request access, correction, or deletion of personal data.

Inquiries related to data protection may be directed to info@smartls.cm.
legal_terms_body_html:
This website is provided for informational and business purposes only. By accessing it, users agree to comply with these terms.

  • Smart Logistics & Services Ltd retains all intellectual property rights to website content.
  • Information is provided without guarantee of completeness or uninterrupted availability.
  • The company is not liable for damages arising from website use or external links.

Use of this website constitutes acceptance of these terms under applicable laws and regulations.
about_hero_title: YOUR TRUSTED PARTNER IN CEMAC REGION
about_hero_lead: Built for compliance, visibility, and dependable execution—operating from Douala as a gateway to the CEMAC region.
about_overview_body: Founded in 2020, Smart Logistics & Services Ltd has expanded rapidly from Customs Brokerage to a full-service 3PL provider. Based in Douala, we serve as the gateway to the CEMAC region.
about_mission_body: To deliver exceptional logistics solutions, exceeding client expectations through timely, cost-effective, and innovative services.
about_vision_body: To become the CEMAC region's leading logistics company, renowned for our expertise, reliability, and customer-centric approach.
about_operational_li_2: Visibility and control across complex operating environments
about_operational_li_3: Dependable last-mile delivery for project-driven operations
about_operational_li_4: Systems, expertise, and partnerships for seamless cross-border trade
about_operational_note: Built to support trade corridors as regional supply chains expand.
about_ceo_p1: At Smart Logistics, we view logistics as a strategic driver of trade, growth, and competitiveness. Our responsibility goes beyond moving cargo. It is about delivering control, visibility, and reliable execution in complex operating environments.
about_ceo_p2: From our headquarters in Douala, we operate at a critical gateway to the CEMAC region and the wider African market. We support international organizations, multinationals, and project-driven operations that require disciplined processes, regulatory compliance, and dependable last-mile delivery.
about_ceo_p3: Africa is entering an enhanced phase of economic integration through the African Continental Free Trade Area. As cross-border flows increase and supply chains become more regional, the need for efficient freight forwarding, customs brokerage, coordinated transport, and trusted project execution will intensify. This is where Smart Logistics & Services Ltd is positioning itself. We are building the systems, expertise, and partnerships required to support seamless trade across borders and corridors.
about_ceo_p4: Our ambition is clear: to be a long-term logistics authority and a preferred gateway for regional and international trade. We remain committed to exceeding expectations and enabling our clients to operate and scale with confidence.
about_esg_sub: Responsible logistics built for long-term impact in the CEMAC region.
about_esg_env_p: Smart Logistics integrates environmentally responsible practices across its operations to reduce emissions, minimize waste, and optimize resource usage throughout the supply chain.
about_esg_env_li_1: Route optimization to reduce fuel consumption and emissions
about_esg_env_li_2: Responsible handling of hazardous and regulated cargo
about_esg_env_li_3: Waste reduction and recycling within warehouse operations
about_esg_env_li_4: Gradual transition toward fuel-efficient fleets and equipment
about_esg_env_li_5: Compliance with local and international environmental regulations
about_esg_soc_p: We prioritize the safety, wellbeing, and development of our people and the communities in which we operate, recognizing that logistics is powered by human expertise.
about_esg_soc_li_1: Strict health, safety, and security standards across operations
about_esg_soc_li_2: Continuous training for operational and compliance staff
about_esg_soc_li_3: Ethical labor practices and zero tolerance for discrimination
about_esg_soc_li_4: Support for humanitarian, development, and NGO supply chains
about_esg_soc_li_5: Local workforce engagement within the CEMAC region
about_esg_gov_p: Our operations are governed by a Strategic Planning Committee and an Operational Excellence Committee, ensuring strong oversight, regulatory compliance, risk management, and operational integrity across every shipment we handle.
about_esg_gov_li_2: Compliance with customs, trade, and international logistics standards
about_esg_gov_li_3: Risk mitigation and internal control procedures
about_cta_title: Ready to work with a disciplined logistics partner?
airfreight_overview_body: SMART LOGISTICS & SERVICES LTD provides end-to-end air freight solutions for urgent, high-value, and sensitive cargo. From documentation to final delivery, we manage every step to ensure speed, compliance, and visibility.
airfreight_delivery_li_1: Pre-alert handling and booking with major international airlines
airfreight_delivery_li_2: Export and import documentation preparation and verification
airfreight_delivery_li_3: Priority customs clearance for time-sensitive shipments
airfreight_delivery_li_5: Real-time shipment status updates via Smart Track
airfreight_ideal_li_4: Samples, spare parts, and urgent equipment
airfreight_advantage_body: Reduced transit time, predictable clearance, and full shipment visibility from airport of origin to final destination.
airfreight_cta: Request a Quote for this Service
home_hero_subtext: Discover how we optimize supply chain management for International Organizations, Multinationals, Local Corporations, and Project Execution in the CEMAC Sub-Region.
home_services_sub: SMART LOGISTICS & SERVICES LTD is a leading logistics and supply chain management company based in Douala, Cameroon, serving the entire CEMAC region. We streamline logistics operations for International Organizations and Multinationals through air, land and sea freight forwarding, customs brokerage, representation and warehousing.
home_services_feature_1_sub: Air, Land, Sea freight forwarding with operational excellence.
home_services_feature_2_sub: Reliable documentation, brokerage procedures, and visibility.
home_services_feature_3_sub: Tailored solutions across Health, Construction, Manufacturing and Humanitarian projects.
home_stat_perf_title: Operational performance across the CEMAC region.
home_industry_1_sub: Handling complex, out-of-gauge cargo for upstream and downstream projects with strict HSE compliance.
home_industry_2_sub: Rapid deployment logistics for NGOs and UN agencies ensuring life-saving supplies reach the last mile in time.
home_industry_3_sub: End-to-end project cargo management for heavy machinery and materials, supporting major infrastructure developments.
home_industry_4_sub: Temperature-controlled supply chains for sensitive pharmaceuticals, ensuring integrity from port to patient/warehouse.
home_pillars_sub: Three service pillars engineered for speed, compliance, and dependable execution across the CEMAC region
home_pillar_1_body: Efficient air, land, and sea freight forwarding for time-sensitive cargo, supported by multimodal coordination, flexible container options (FCL/LCL, RF/DC), and visibility through real-time tracking.
home_pillar_2_body: Compliance-led logistics services including customs brokerage, import/export operations, and business representation—structured to reduce delays, control cost, and ensure correct documentation and regulatory alignment.
home_pillar_3_body: Reliable transportation for project cargo and sensitive goods, plus secure warehousing with flexible storage and WMS-enabled inventory visibility—built for last-mile performance and controlled handling.
home_testimonial_1_quote: “SMART LOGISTICS AND SERVICES LTD. has been an invaluable partner. Their expertise in customs clearance and transportation has saved us millions of FCFA. Their professionalism is unmatched.”
home_testimonial_2_quote: “We entrusted SMART LOGISTICS with our sensitive pharmaceutical shipments. Their real-time tracking and monitoring ensured seamless delivery, and their customer service was top-notch.”
home_testimonial_3_quote: “SMART LOGISTICS exceeded our expectations in re-exporting heavy equipment from Cameroon to Ivory Coast. Their expertise saved us valuable time.”
home_partner_sub: SMART LOGISTICS & SERVICES LTD Ltd is always looking to expand its network of trusted agents and partners. If you are a freight forwarder, NVOCC, or logistics provider looking for a reliable partner in the CEMAC region, connect with us.
home_partner_point_2: Partner onboarding designed for clarity and speed
home_partner_point_3: Trusted network alignment (WCA • FIATA • JC Trans)
home_partner_note: We review submissions and respond with next steps.
home_partner_upload_hint: PDF only. Keep file size reasonable.
home_contact_address_value: 1030, Avenue Douala Manga Bell, Douala, Cameroon

landfreight_overview_body: SMART LOGISTICS & SERVICES LTD provides inland transportation across Cameroon and the wider CEMAC region, ensuring safe and compliant delivery even in remote or challenging terrains.
landfreight_delivery_li_1: Route surveys and risk assessment before dispatch
landfreight_delivery_li_2: Specialized transport for heavy, OOG, and sensitive cargo
landfreight_delivery_li_3: Cross-border transit documentation and customs coordination
landfreight_delivery_li_4: GPS-enabled convoy monitoring and escort services
landfreight_delivery_li_5: Direct delivery to project sites, warehouses, or final clients
landfreight_advantage_body: Deep regional expertise, regulatory mastery, and reliable execution beyond major corridors.

portfolio_sub: Detailed Case Studies with distinct "Challenge," "Solution," and "Impact" sections
seafreight_overview_body: We offer reliable sea freight forwarding solutions through major global shipping lines, handling both Full Container Load (FCL) and Less than Container Load (LCL) shipments. Our team manages port operations, customs processes, and inland evacuation seamlessly.
seafreight_delivery_li_1: Vessel booking and space optimization (FCL / LCL)
seafreight_delivery_li_3: Port discharge coordination and cargo evacuation
seafreight_delivery_li_5: Integration with inland transport and warehousing
seafreight_advantage_body: Minimized demurrage, controlled port dwell time, and smooth transition from vessel to final destination.
seafreight_cta: Request a Quote for this Service
services_a_head_title: Efficient and Secure Air, Land, and Sea Freight Solutions
services_a_list_text_1: Seamless integration of Air, Sea, and Land transport.
services_a_list_text_2: Fast transit times with real-time tracking.
services_a_list_text_3: Flexible container options (FCL/LCL) and types (RF/DC) and competitive pricing.
services_a_list_text_4: Expert brokerage formalities/procedures and documentation processing.
services_a_panel_title: Efficient and Secure Air, Land, and Sea Freight Solutions
services_b1_body: Minimizing delays and costs through expert knowledge of regulations and efficient clearance procedures.
services_b1_kv: Competitive pricing and average 48-hour clearance time.
services_b2_body: Ensuring regulatory compliance and efficient documentation processing for seamless import and export operations.
services_b2_kv: Real-time tracking and expert customs brokerage services.
services_b3_body: Providing local representation services for international businesses. We offer local market expertise and handle regulatory compliance.
services_b3_kv: Faster market entry with compliant local representation and hands-on regulatory management.
services_c1_body: We provide reliable transportation solutions for Heavy Equipment, Project Cargo, Perishables, and Pharmaceutical goods, ensuring safe and timely delivery across the CEMAC region through optimized routing and compliant handling.
services_c1_kv: Flexible transportation options and real-time tracking.
services_c2_body: Secure warehousing facilities for safe storage solutions.
services_c2_kv: Flexible storage options and real-time inventory tracking from WMS.
